hero.subtitle: Experts in corporate, immigration, and real estate law for international investors and companies.

whycr.title: Why Costa Rica?
whycr.subtitle: A privileged destination for investment and business in the Americas, backed by decades of proven stability.
whycr.reason1_desc: Over 75 years of uninterrupted democracy, recognized as the most solid and stable in all of Central America.
whycr.reason2_desc: International transactions with strong dollar parity, providing confidence and financial predictability for investors.
whycr.reason3_desc: Independent judiciary, consolidated Rule of Law, and effective protection of private property and investments.
whycr.reason4_desc: At the heart of the Americas, with privileged access to North, Central, and South American markets.
whycr.reason5_desc: World-renowned for its biodiversity, environmental sustainability, and high human development index.
whycr.reason6_desc: Favorable legal framework for foreign investors with equal conditions to those of nationals.
